title: Spiced Ethiopian Chicken with Ghee
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Ethiopia, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe serves four people and is gluten-free.
instructions: 1. Heat ghee in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add medicated butter and alicha spice blend; cook for 1 minute.
3. Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
4. Add chicken broth, water, and salt; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
6. Stir in Ethiopian ye and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
8. Serve with injera or rice, if desired.
